name: The Richest Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix flour, 1/2 cup confectioner's sugar, and lemon zest. Add yolks and butter; beat together until smooth.
2. Form dough into two balls (approximately equal) and chill for one hour.
3. Preheat oven to 275°F (135°C). Pat the larger ball of dough into a 9-inch springform pan to form a crust that rises about 2 inches on the sides. Bake the crust in the preheated oven for 1 hour and 10 minutes.
4. Meanwhile, beat cream cheese until fluffy. Add 2 cups confectioner's sugar, flour, and salt; mix well.
5. Gradually add eggs one at a time, beating thoroughly after each addition.
6. Stir coffee into amaretto until dissolved.
7. Combine the liquid with the cheese mixture and stir well.
8. Pour the batter evenly over the baked crust in the springform pan.
9. Remove from oven and increase temperature to 350°F (175°C). Roll out remaining dough on a floured surface, cut into strips, and weave them over the cake's surface, trimming excess dough.
10. Return the cheesecake to the oven and bake for an additional 15 minutes.
11. Allow the cheesecake to cool completely in the oven with the door ajar for one to two hours.
12. Refrigerate until serving.
13. Dust the cooled crust with confectioner's sugar before serving.
